summary: Created skill_extractor.py with extract, check-similarity, list-candidates, and promote commands. Integrates with /zo/ask for LLM classification. Outputs human-readable candidates to N5/review/skills/.

decisions.decision: Used /zo/ask with structured output for classification
decisions.rationale: Ensures consistent JSON parsing while leveraging LLM semantic understanding

decisions.decision: Candidates output as markdown, not just JSON
decisions.rationale: Human-readable review is critical for HITL flow

learnings: Semantic similarity via LLM prompt is simpler than embedding comparison for this use case
broadcast: skill_extractor.py ready — call extract_from_build(slug) in build-close or extract_from_thread(convo_id) in thread-close
